title: Community Health Assist Scheme (CHAS)
text:
Community Health Assist Scheme (CHAS) - SupportGoWhere
Community Health Assist Scheme (CHAS)
Share link
Provides subsidies for medical and dental care at participating GPs and dental clinics for all Singapore Citizens.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Subsidies at participating clinics for selected illnesses, conditions, dental services, health screenings and vaccinations
Processing time takes up to 15 working days
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Subsidies at participating clinics for selected illnesses, conditions, and dental services

Subsidised nationally-recommended health screenings and vaccinations

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen




From 1 Oct 2024,

For CHAS Blue, monthly household income per capita of $1,500 and below (or annual value of property of $21,000 and below for households with no income)

For CHAS Orange, monthly household income per capita of between $1,501 to $2,300 (or annual value of property of between $21,001 - $31,000 for households with no income)

For CHAS Green, monthly household income per capita of above $2,300 (or annual value of property of above $31,000 for households with no income)

How to apply?

You can apply:

Online at the MOH website

By mailing the completed application form and supporting documents to Privy Box No. 920231 Singapore 929292

Applications will generally be processed within 15 working days from the date of receipt of the completed application.

Where can I find help?

View more details

CHAS Hotline: 1800 275 2427

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 29 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
